info.title: MauiReactor.HotReloadConsole
info.description: This command allows hot-reload of an application written with MauiReactor.

options.name: --framework
options.description:
Required. Specify the framework: net10.0-android,
net10.0-ios, net10.0-maccatalyst, or
net10.0-windows10.0.XXXXX.0

options.name: --proj
options.description:
Project file name (if different from that contained
in the current directory)

options.name: --dir
options.description:
Working directory (if different from the current
one)

options.name: --host
options.description: Identify the remote host running the emulator

options.name: --register-defaults
options.description:
Register default MsBuild locations using
MSBuildLocator.RegisterDefaults()
